message.content:
(1) Yes, there’s a 3D chess board with a flat, stylized visual style—pieces are outlined in purple against light brown/dark brown checkered squares, giving a minimalist, modern look.  
(2) A chat/AI assistant panel is positioned on the **left side** (labeled “Talk with me”).  
(3) Overall layout: **Split screen** with a left chat panel, central chess board, and right sidebar (for game info/buttons).  
(4) Color scheme: Dark purple/black background with purple accents, light brown/dark brown board, and white/purple text.  
(5) No 3D character—only UI (chess board, chat, sidebar).
